label: High-fit marketing role discovery case
profileText: Marketing student targeting full-time brand marketing and product marketing roles in New York City. Experience with campaign execution, launch support, reporting, cross-functional coordination, content calendars, presentation development, Excel reporting, Google Analytics, Canva, and PowerPoint. Class of 2026. Wants full-time work in NYC.
jobText: Assistant Brand Marketing Manager based in New York City. Full-time role supporting campaign launches, cross-functional coordination, content calendars, brand reporting, presentation development, and performance tracking. Required tools include Excel and Google Analytics. Preferred tools include Canva and PowerPoint.
